"C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Community\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\StudentManager.dir/objects.a
C:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\StudentManager.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\StudentManager.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\StudentManager.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o bin\StudentManager.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libStudentManager.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\StudentManager.dir\linkLibs.rsp
